differential_diagnoses: Obstructive sleep apnea with chronic hypercapnic respiratory failure
next_steps: Admission to the intensive care unit for close respiratory monitoring
Nerve conduction studies and needle electromyography
Serum acetylcholine receptor antibody and anti-MuSK antibody testing
Lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis (protein-cell dissociation)
Polysomnography or nocturnal oximetry to evaluate sleep-disordered breathing
Screening for underlying malignancy including age-appropriate imaging
